title: capraria integerrima
intro: Capraria integerrima, also known as the horned poppy or Mexican poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Capraria integerrima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Capraria integerrima can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
